title: Laling Fort
tagline: Laling Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Laling Killa is a small fort (killa) situated in the present day Dhule district of Maharashtra state in India.
overview.description: Laling Killa is a small fort (killa) situated in the present day Dhule district of Maharashtra state in India. The fort is situated on top of Laling hill about 9.65 km (6.00 mi) south of Dhule city. It was one of the important forts in the Khandesh region during the time of the Faruqi Kings.

topPlaces.name: Udane
topPlaces.description: Udane is a small village in the state of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Dhule taluka of Dhule District in Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Dabhadi, Malegaon
topPlaces.description: Dabhadi is a small town in Malegaon taluka of Nashik district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is located on Maharashtra State Highway 19 between the towns of Malegaon and Satana.

items.note: Udane is a small village in the state of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Dhule taluka of Dhule District in Maharashtra.
Dabhadi is a small town in Malegaon taluka of Nashik district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is located on Maharashtra State Highway 19 between the towns of Malegaon and Satana.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Laling Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Laling Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Laling Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (86 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Laling Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Laling Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Laling Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Laling Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Laling Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Udane, Dabhadi, Malegaon.
